comment.body:
Never forget that the success of trading primarly depends on the risk management.
Because everybody loses money on the market. Market cannot be predicted for 100%, there is no free lunch, no "equation of the market" or some kind of model, that predicts everything always accurately.

Even the algos lose money

comment.body:
So have a plan, 
have a strategy,
trade only when you have a concept, a clear idea about what you wanna do.

comment.body:
know how much money you can put into work, 
what risk you can take that day.
place your bets based on your read, and watch for the dynamics to prove or disprove your bets.

Cut the losers quickly, when disproven, size up on the winners, and jump quick out.
If all of your positions end up in loss, don't fomo.

it happens. 
you weren't wrong. Market works that way. Probability  works that way.
Never take it personal!

comment.body: To my understanding about the daily risk level is that they show the trend being set. But only intraday. So if we break the risk level to the downside. That doesn't mean that the top is in, but that we will likely continue down that day
